accounts.name: creator
docs: The market creator (only they can cancel an open market).

accounts.name: market
docs: The market being cancelled. Must be in Open status, must be owned
by `creator`.

accounts.name: user
docs: The position holder.

accounts.name: market
docs: The market the position belongs to. Must be Cancelled.

accounts.name: position
docs: The user's position on this market. Closed on success; rent → user.

errors.name: ClusterNotSet
errors.msg: Cluster not set in MXE account

errors.name: AbortedComputation
errors.msg: Computation was aborted by the MPC cluster

errors.name: QuestionTooLong
errors.msg: Question text exceeds maximum length

errors.name: DescriptionTooLong
errors.msg: Description exceeds maximum length

errors.name: CategoryTooLong
errors.msg: Category exceeds maximum length

errors.name: MarketNotOpen
errors.msg: Market is not currently open for positions

errors.name: MarketNotClosed
errors.msg: Market has not yet reached its close timestamp

errors.name: AlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Market has already been resolved

errors.name: NotResolved
errors.msg: Market is not yet resolved

errors.name: InvalidCloseTime
errors.msg: Resolution timestamp is in the past

errors.name: UnauthorizedResolver
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized to resolve this market

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Position has already been claimed

errors.name: InvalidOutcome
errors.msg: Invalid outcome value (must be 0 or 1)

errors.name: ZeroStake
errors.msg: Stake amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient vault balance for payout

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized for this operation

errors.name: MarketNotCancelled
errors.msg: Market is not in Cancelled status

errors.name: VaultUnderfunded
errors.msg: Vault does not have enough balance to refund

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidStake
errors.msg: Stake amount must be greater than zero

types.name: ClaimPayoutV2Output
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: ClockAccount
docs: An account storing the current network epoch

types.name: ComputationDefinitionAccount
docs: An account representing a [ComputationDefinition] in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationDefinitionMeta
docs: A computation definition for execution in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationSignature
docs: The signature of a computation defined in a [ComputationDefinition].

types.name: Config
docs: Global program config — singleton.

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority allowed to perform admin ops (pause, set fee, etc.)

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee in basis points (1 bp = 0.01%). Charged on winning payouts.

fields.name: fee_recipient
docs: Where fees accrue.

fields.name: market_count
docs: Total markets created (monotonic counter for PDAs).

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for the PDA.

types.name: Epoch
docs: The network epoch

types.name: MXEAccount
docs: A MPC Execution Environment.

fields.name: id
docs: Monotonic ID (== Config.market_count at creation).

fields.name: creator
docs: Wallet that created the market and earns the creator fee.

fields.name: resolver
docs: Who is permitted to call `resolve_market`. Often == creator,
but could be a designated oracle pubkey.

fields.name: question
docs: The yes/no question.

fields.name: close_ts
docs: Unix timestamp after which no more positions may be submitted.

fields.name: resolved_ts
docs: Unix timestamp when the market was actually resolved (0 until resolved).

fields.name: status
docs: Status flag.

fields.name: winning_outcome
docs: After resolution, 0 = NO won, 1 = YES won.

fields.name: yes_pool
docs: Public reveal: total YES pool (lamports). Set on resolution.

fields.name: no_pool
docs: Public reveal: total NO pool. Set on resolution.

fields.name: totals_ciphertext
docs: Encrypted ciphertext of `MarketTotals` while market is open.
32 bytes is one Arcium ciphertext element; we have 3 fields packed.
Arcium ciphertext layout: 3 elements of 32 bytes each = 96 bytes.

fields.name: totals_pubkey
docs: X25519 public key of the MXE that owns the totals ciphertext.

fields.name: totals_nonce
docs: Nonce used for the totals ciphertext (rotates on every update).

fields.name: total_positions
docs: Total participants (revealed after each submission, intentionally).

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for the Market PDA.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: Bump for the vault PDA holding stakes.

types.name: MxeStatus
docs: The status of an MXE.

types.name: NodeMetadata
docs: location as [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html) country code

types.name: NodeRef
docs: A reference to a node in the cluster.
The offset is to derive the Node Account.
The current_total_rewards is the total rewards the node has received so far in the current
epoch.

types.name: Output
docs: An output of a computation.
We currently don't support encrypted outputs yet since encrypted values are passed via
data objects.

types.name: Parameter
docs: A parameter of a computation.
We differentiate between plaintext and encrypted parameters and data objects.
Plaintext parameters are directly provided as their value.
Encrypted parameters are provided as an offchain reference to the data.
Data objects are provided as a reference to the data object account.

fields.name: ciphertext
docs: Encrypted UserPosition (outcome + amount), owned by the user's key.
2 ciphertext elements = 64 bytes.

fields.name: user_pubkey
docs: X25519 public key of the user (recipient of the encrypted output).

fields.name: nonce
docs: Nonce used for this position's ciphertext.

fields.name: stake_amount
docs: Plaintext stake amount the user actually transferred to the vault.
We need this on-chain to enforce conservation: vault_balance >= sum(stake).
It's NOT private — but it doesn't reveal the *outcome* the user picked,
which is the herd-inducing signal we care about.

fields.name: claimed
docs: Has this position been claimed post-resolution?

types.name: ResolveMarketV2Output
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: SetUnset
docs: Utility struct to store a value that needs to be set by a certain number of participants (keys
in our case). Once all participants have set the value, the value is considered set and we only
store it once.

types.name: SubmitPositionV2Output
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.
